title: Wolf Armor and Storage Enhanced (MuddyPort)
description: Craftable wolf armor, wolf chest storage, auto-healing, and more.
body:
**Summary:** Craftable wolf armor in 7 materials, wolf chest storage, auto-healing, and more. Ported to 1.20.1 Forge with some new enhancements! Now compatible with [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)!

Equip your tamed wolves with craftable armor in 7 different materials, give them a chest for portable storage, and watch them heal themselves from food in their inventory. This port also adds some more material-specific special effects, vanilla enchanting support, and vanilla loot table integration that weren't in the original.


🛡️ Wolf Armor (7 Materials)
- **Leather** — Light protection, craftable early
- **Copper** — Mid-tier
- **Chainmail** — Found in dungeon loot only (not craftable), grants a damage boost to wolf attacks
- **Iron** — Solid all-round protection
- **Gold** — Enemies killed by your wolf drop extra loot (Looting II effect)
- **Diamond** — High defense with knockback resistance
- **Netherite** — Top-tier defense, grants your wolf permanent Fire Resistance

Right-click a tamed wolf with any wolf armor to equip it. Armor is visible on the wolf with custom render layers.

📦 Wolf Chest Storage
- Right-click a tamed wolf with a Wolf Chest to attach storage
- Shift+right-click to open the 14-slot inventory GUI
- Wolves drop all stored items on death
🩹 Auto-Heal Behavior
- Wolves with a chest will automatically eat food from their inventory to heal
- Configurable via config file
🌙 Howl at Moon
- Wolves occasionally howl at night with custom sound effects
- Configurable via config file
✨ Enchantment Support
- All wolf armor can be enchanted on an anvil with:
- Protection, Fire Protection, Blast Protection, Projectile Protection Unbreaking

🗺️ Loot Table Integration
Wolf armor spawns naturally in vanilla structure chests:
- Dungeons, Nether Fortresses, Desert Temples, Jungle Temples
- Strongholds, End Cities, Mineshafts, Ancient Cities
- Bastions, Ruined Portals, Buried Treasure, Village Armorers
- Loot rates match equivalent horse armor / chainmail armor weights. Configurable — can be disabled in the config.

🔍 Jade Compatibility (Optional)
If Jade is installed, the built-in HUD overlay auto-disables and Jade displays:
- Armor name, defense value, and durability percentage
- Chest storage usage (used/total slots)

⚙️ Configurable
All major features can be toggled in the config:
- Enable/disable crafting recipes
- Enable/disable wolf inventory system
- Enable/disable loot table injection
- Enable/disable auto-heal and howl behaviors
- Toggle armor/inventory rendering
- Toggle stat overlay (auto-disabled when Jade is present)

**Compatibility**
- **LetSleepingDogsLie** — Fully compatible. Armor renders correctly in lying/sleeping poses.
- **Jade** — Built-in optional integration. No extra files needed.

This is a Forge port (and enhancement) of the NeoForge Port 1.21.10 by [Smallinger](https://github.com/Smallinger/wolf-armor-and-storage-legacy)

Original mod by [Satyrnidae](https://github.com/satyrnidae/wolf-armor-and-storage-legacy) (1.12.2)
